items.title: fix(whatsapp): stop reconnecting quiet sockets
items.summary:
fix(whatsapp): stop reconnecting quiet sockets Fixes #70678.

Keeps quiet but healthy WhatsApp linked-device sessions connected by tracking WhatsApp Web transport activity, while retaining a longer app-silence cap so frame activity cannot mask a stuck session forever. Also cleans up transport activity listeners on failed connection-open paths.

Carries forward the focused #71466 approach and keeps #63939 as related configurable-timeout follow-up. Thanks @vincentkoc and @oromeis.

Validation:
- pnpm test:serial extensions/whatsapp/src/auto-reply.web-auto-reply.connection-and-logging.e2e.test.ts extensions/whatsapp/src/connection-controller.test.ts
- pnpm check:changed
- codex review --base origin/main
